listSubtitle: Money owed to your household — loans, deposits in transit, outstanding refunds.
emptyBody: Create your first receivable to start tracking month-end balances owed to you.
deleteRowDescription: {{name}} will be hidden from lists and reports. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
deleteDetailDescription: Snapshots and history will be hidden. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
createDescription: Track money owed to your household — loans you've made, deposits you're due back, refunds in transit.
editDescription: Currency is not editable — create a new receivable if it needs to change. Ownership is editable.
snapshotsEmpty: No snapshots yet. Click "New" to record this month's outstanding balance.

tour.overviewBody: Track money owed to you over time — it counts toward your net worth until it's repaid.
tour.actionsBody: Use “Edit” to change its details, “Close” to mark it ended — it then stops counting toward your net worth — or “Delete” to remove it entirely.
tour.detailsBody: Counterparty and due date were set when you added the receivable. Use “Edit” to change them.
tour.chartBody: Each point is a month's outstanding amount, so you can watch it get repaid.
tour.snapshotsBody: Each row is one month's amount owed to you. Tap “New” to record the outstanding amount this month, or “Import” for several months at once.
